title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates:
Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates!
